description.value:
Skill Path: Ghost

Your ability to hide and sneak is unmatched.

While developing your skills in Stealth you chose to focus specifically on Ghost, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lB9MVGCJr7aJQuIH]{Armored Stealth}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lB9MVGCJr7aJQuIH]{Armored Stealth}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.9SdFlVQW4vM8ggh8]{Fane's Escape}
  • Master: choose one of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Imvu2RV2ggjJ2HZt]{Swift Sneak}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tP9Hs6hHkeeCJctS]{Vanish Into the Land}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.n0urrOL8YlnVBVRQ]{Legendary Sneak}
